samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave signal generator.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">5-bit output waveform signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="0">Initial state: Increment waveform.</state>
        <state id="1">Increment state: Decrement waveform.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    The module generates a triangle waveform signal by incrementing and decrementing a 5-bit signal named "wave". The waveform cycles between 0 and 31, with the incrementing and decrementing operations controlled by a state machine. The state machine has two states: 0 and 1. In state 0, the waveform is incremented by 1 until it reaches 31, which transitions the state machine to state 1. In state 1, the waveform is decremented by 1 until it reaches 0, which transitions the state machine back to state 0. The state machine continues to cycle between states 0 and 1 to generate a continuous triangle waveform signal.
    </implementation>
</module>
